news.paragraph: No fresh ticker-specific news available for LITE this build (Yahoo returned nothing readable, or every article was paywalled). Falling back to sector + macro context: LITE is classified as Semis. Macro backdrop: 10Y Treasury yield at 4.59% (+2.80% over 5d, rising), DXY at 99.19 (-0.08% over 5d, flat) — see the Bonds & USD tab for how this typically translates to this sector. Treat this take as market context, not a name-specific catalyst.

examples.body: $LITE all institutions are selling stock why are you providing liquidity for the market. You will be holding this bag and stress
Leopold Aschenbrenner is straight-up showing the tape - 1 In just 12 months, he turned $225M → $5.5B. Unreal track record. Last year’s calls? Absolute monsters…
Further context on why David Heard’s addition to the $PENG board is notable. Heard previously served as CEO of Infinera, where he oversaw its $2.3B acquisition…
